revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Column-generating_template_families here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
=== Column-generating template families === '''The templates listed here are not interchangeable'''. For example, using {{tl|col-float}} with {{tl|col-end}} instead of {{tl|col-float-end}} would leave a {{tag|div|link=yes}} open, potentially harming any subsequent formatting.
{| class="wikitable" style="line-height:1.4em" |+ Column templates |- style="vertical-align:middle;" ! scope="col" | Type ! scope="col" | Family ! scope="col" | {{longitem|Handles wiki
table code?{{sup|{{dagger}}}}}} ! scope="col" | Responsive/
mobile suited ! scope="col" | Start template ! scope="col" | Column divider ! scope="col" | End template |- | rowspan="2" | Float | "col-float" | {{yes}} | {{yes}} | {{tl|col-float}} | {{tl|col-float-break}} | {{tl|col-float-end}} |- | "columns-start" | {{yes}} | {{yes}} | {{tl|columns-start}} | {{tl|column}} | {{tl|columns-end}} |- | rowspan="2" | Columns | "div col" | {{yes}} | {{yes}} | {{tl|div col}} | instead use {{tl|no col break}} | {{tl|div col end}} |- | "columns-list" | {{no}} | {{yes}} | {{tl|columns-list}} (wraps div col) | – | – |- | Flexbox | "flex columns" | {{no}} | {{yes}} | {{tl|flex columns}} | – | – |- | Table | "col" | {{yes}} | {{no}} | {{tl|col-begin}},
{{tl|col-begin-fixed}} or
{{tl|col-begin-small}} | {{tl|col-break}} or
{{tl|col-2}} .. {{tl|col-5}} | {{tl|col-end}} |} {{sup|{{dagger}}}} Can the template handle the basic [[Help:Wiki markup|wiki markup]] {| | || |- |} [[Help:Tables|used to create tables]]? If not, special templates that produce these elements (such as {{tl|(!}}, {{tl|!}}, {{tl|!!}}, {{tl|!-}}, {{tl|!)}}) or [[HTML element|HTML tags]] ({{tag|table}}, {{tag|tr}}, etc.) need to be used instead.
{{Documentation | content = Used by column template documentation pages to provide links to other column-related templates. [[Category:Multi-column templates| ]] [[Category:Related-topic templates]] }}
